steps.title: Subtract the equations
steps.content:
The system is
$$
x+y=125
$$
$$
x+y+y=155
$$
The second equation has one extra $y$ compared with the first equation.

steps.title: Solve for the extra term
steps.content:
Subtract the first equation from the second:
$$
(x+2y)-(x+y)=155-125
$$
$$
y=30
$$

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: Graphing the two equations and reading the intersection gives the same $y$-coordinate. The answer is 30.
